signUp.title: Sign up
signUp.subtitle: Create your account to get started

validation.usernameRequired: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameTooLong: Username must be less than 50 characters
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be less than 255 characters
validation.passwordRequirements: Must contain 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, and 1 digit
validation.birthdayInvalid: Please enter date in DD-MM-YYYY format

success.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! Redirecting to sign-in page...

configWarning.title: Social Login Configuration Required
configWarning.subtitle: The following social login providers are not configured:
configWarning.instructions: Please add these environment variables to your .env file and restart the development server.

google.name: Google OAuth
google.instructions:
1. Go to Google Cloud Console
2. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID
3. Add authorized redirect URIs

github.name: GitHub OAuth
github.instructions:
1. Go to GitHub Developer Settings
2. Create new OAuth App
3. Set callback URL

facebook.name: Facebook OAuth
facebook.instructions:
1. Go to Facebook Developers
2. Create new app
3. Add Facebook Login product
